error_signature: Cannot create a string longer than 0x1fffffe8 characters
title: File size limitation when downloading Zoom recordings
symptom: When attempting to download a large Zoom recording, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot create a string longer than 0x1fffffe8 characters'. This prevents the download from completing successfully.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n is attempting to store binary data in memory, which exceeds the allowed string length for large files. This is a limitation of the memory storage mode used in the Docker setup.
fix_steps: Open your n8n Docker configuration file (docker-compose.yml or environment variables).
Set the following environment variables: N8N_DEFAULT_BINARY_DATA_MODE=filesystem, N8N_BINARY_DATA_TTL=60, N8N_BINARY_DATA_MANAGER_MODE=filesystem.
Restart your n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Change the binary data storage mode to filesystem in your Docker configuration and restart n8n.
